covid_surveillance.short_description: Weekly covid surveillance data from New Jersey Department of Health
covid_surveillance.long_description: New Jersey Department of Health collects and reports covid surveillance data weekly. Data covers emergency department visits, hospitalizations, laboratory-confirmed cases, and/or percent positivity.

nj_dph.name: New Jersey Department of Health
nj_dph.description: New Jersey Department of Health provides weekly respiratory surveillance data for New Jersey covering pathogens including: covid, influenza, rsv, adenovirus, coronavirus, enterovirus, metapneumovirus, parainfluenza, ili . Data is published via state health department dashboards and reports. Temporal coverage: ~2019-ongoing. Geographic coverage: state level.
nj_dph.restrictions: Public domain state government health data.
